title: NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP - 211info
text: MORROW COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH BOARDMAN CLINIC NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program that supports pregnant people from early pregnancy through their child’s second birthday, pairing new parents with a specially trained nurse for support, advice and resource connection. Nurses provide health and developmental screenings to identify potential problems with growth, hearing, social-emotional development, oral health, and other issues. Offers breastfeeding support, parenting support, and general parenting education. 101 Boardman Avenue NW Boardman, OR 97818 Eligibility: Pregnant people with a household income below 185% FPL, must enroll prior to the 29th week of pregnancy Hours: Monday-Tuesday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 481-4200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 481-4200 Morrow County Residents Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Tuesday 8:30am-1pm and 1:30pm-5pm Services: General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MORROW COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH BOARDMAN CLINIC
